data.title: Mineros S.A. Begins Trading on OTCQX to Boost U.S. Market Access
data.description:
Mineros SA ( (TSE:MSA) ) has issued an update.

Mineros S.A. has commenced trading on the OTCQX Best Market under the symbol ‘MNSAF’, aiming to enhance access and liquidity for U.S. investors. This strategic move aligns with the company’s initiative to meet the strong demand for high-quality gold equities in the U.S., leveraging streamlined market standards to facilitate information availability.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:MSA) stock is a Buy with a C$5.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Mineros SA stock, see the TSE:MSA Stock Forecast page.

More about Mineros SA

Mineros S.A. is a prominent gold mining company based in Medellin, Colombia, with operations in Colombia and Nicaragua, and exploration projects in Latin America, including Chile. The company is known for its focus on safety, sustainability, and shareholder value, with a history of delivering solid dividends.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

data.title: QPL International Holdings Passes All AGM Resolutions Unanimously
data.description:
QPL International Holdings ( (HK:0243) ) has issued an announcement.

QPL International Holdings Limited announced the successful passing of all proposed resolutions at its Annual General Meeting held on October 3, 2025. The resolutions included the adoption of audited financial statements, the appointment of McMillan Woods (Hong Kong) CPA Limited as auditors, re-election of directors, and the approval of a new share option scheme. All resolutions received unanimous support, reflecting strong shareholder confidence in the company’s governance and strategic direction.

More about QPL International Holdings

QPL International Holdings Limited is a company incorporated in Bermuda, operating with limited liability. The company is listed on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange and is involved in various business activities, though specific industry details are not provided in the announcement.

data.title: Greenpro Capital Finalizes Private Placement Agreement
data.description:
Greenpro Capital ( (GRNQ) ) has provided an announcement.

On October 1, 2025, Greenpro Capital Corp. finalized subscription agreements with individual investors for a private placement of 100,000 shares of its common stock at $1.30 per share. The transaction was conducted without underwriters, relying on exemptions from registration under the Securities Act, as all purchasers were accredited investors. The proceeds from this offering are intended to be used for the company’s operating capital.

data.description:

The company submitted the voting results and the consolidated scrutinizer’s report to the National Stock Exchange of India, in compliance with SEBI regulations. data.title: Establishment Labs Amends Credit Agreement with Oaktree
data.description:
Establishment Labs Holdings ( (ESTA) ) has issued an update.

On September 29, 2025, Establishment Labs Holdings Inc. amended its Credit Agreement with Oaktree Fund Administration, allowing for the immediate availability of Tranche D Term Loans and increasing the required minimum liquidity from $25 million to $30 million. The company fully borrowed $25 million under the new terms, which could enhance its financial flexibility and support its operational strategies.

The most recent analyst rating on (ESTA) stock is a Hold with a $42.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Establishment Labs Holdings stock, see the ESTA Stock Forecast page.

Establishment Labs Holdings’ overall score is driven by strong revenue growth and positive guidance from the earnings call. However, financial performance concerns, including high debt and negative cash flows, weigh heavily on the score. Technical indicators provide some support, but valuation remains a challenge due to ongoing losses.

To see Spark’s full report on ESTA stock, click here.

More about Establishment Labs Holdings

Establishment Labs Holdings Inc. operates in the medical technology industry, focusing primarily on the development and manufacturing of advanced silicone breast implants and other medical devices. The company is known for its innovative products aimed at improving patient outcomes and safety in the aesthetic and reconstructive surgery markets.

data.title: mDR Limited Announces Significant Securities Transactions
data.description:
An announcement from mDR Limited ( (SG:Y3D) ) is now available.

mDR Limited, a company listed on the Singapore Exchange, has announced recent transactions involving quoted securities. Between July 25 and September 30, 2025, the company acquired quoted securities valued at approximately S$6,848,224, representing 4.6% of its latest audited net tangible assets. Additionally, it sold quoted securities worth approximately S$1,988,537, equating to 1.3% of its net tangible assets. These transactions reflect the company’s ongoing investment strategy and could impact its financial positioning and asset management.

data.title: Arta TechFin Revises Investment Management Agreement with Concord
data.description:
Arta TechFin Corporation Limited ( (HK:0279) ) has issued an update.

Arta TechFin Corporation Limited announced a supplemental agreement with Concord to amend the terms of their Investment Management Agreement (IMA). The revised terms include a management fee set at 1%, accrued monthly, and payable within 15 days after the end of each calendar month. This adjustment aims to ensure sustainable and fair investment management services amid current market conditions, aligning with the company’s strategic objectives to maintain stability in its asset management business. The directors believe these terms are fair, reasonable, and in the best interests of the company and its shareholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:0279) stock is a Hold with a HK$1.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Arta TechFin Corporation Limited stock, see the HK:0279 Stock Forecast page.

More about Arta TechFin Corporation Limited

Arta TechFin Corporation Limited is an investment holding company operating in the financial services sector. It provides a comprehensive range of SFO regulated services, including securities and futures brokerage, placing, underwriting, corporate advisory, margin financing, asset management, investment advisory, and insurance brokerage services.

Average Trading Volume: 1,481,629

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: HK$1.11B
